name: HA-ViD
source: iai-hrc/ha-vid: Config files for my GitHub profile.
data_type: RGB + depth video with skeleton data

name: IKEA ASM
data_type: Multi‑modal (RGB + depth + pose + object segmentation/tracking + action labels)

name: REASSEMBLE
source: REASSEMBLE: A Multimodal Dataset for Contact-rich Robotic Assembly and Disassembly
data_type: Multimodal (RGB, event camera, audio, force–torque, robot proprioception, pose, action labels)

name: HA4M
source: HA4M - Human Action Multi-Modal Monitoring in Manufacturing
assembly_task: Human industrial assembly (multi‑step, tool‑based, real‑world procedures)
data_type: RGB + depth video with skeleton data
license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International license (CC BY 4.0)

name: IndustReal
assembly_task: Industrial procedural assembly (multi‑step, egocentric, with execution and procedural errors)
data_type: RGB video frames + hand/pose/gaze tracking + ground‑truth labels

name: MECCANO
assembly_task: Toy motorbike assembly in an industrial‑like setting (egocentric, multi‑step, tool‑based)
data_type: RGB + depth video with gaze data (multimodal egocentric)

name: NIST MOAD
source: pgavriel/MOADv2: Access point for v2 of the Manufacturing Objects and Assemblies Dataset (MOAD)
assembly_task: NIST Assembly Task Boards (ATB) 1–4 assembly tasks
data_type: RGB images, point clouds, CAD models, fused 3D meshes (no time-series robot/task data)
license: Not specified (no LICENSE file or terms in repository)
download_link: No direct link; downloaded via scripts/download_moad.py using downloader_config.json.

name: Assemble Them All
source: yunshengtian/Assemble-Them-All: [SIGGRAPH Asia 2022] Assemble Them All: Physics-Based Planning for Generalizable Assembly by Disassembly
assembly_task: Industrial mechanical assembly (two‑part and multi‑part; translation, rotation, and sequence‑based tasks)
data_type: 3D CAD meshes + assembly metadata (no video, no force, no pose)

name: Aero Fastener
source: Robotic assembly data of threaded fasteners: aeronautical collars - Mendeley Data
assembly_task: Robotic screwing of aeronautical threaded fasteners (alignment, backspin, and fastening)
data_type: Force–torque + robot kinematics (position, orientation, linear & angular velocity) with assembly outcome labels
